name: Dip and Sprinkle
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter, softened                          1 cup Finely ground almonds
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------CHOCOLATE DIPPING MIXTURE-------------------------
6 ounces Semi-sweet chocolate chips 1 Tablespoon Hot water
3 Tablespoons Butter 1 x Chocolate or candy sprinkles
1. Sift already sifted flour with salt and set aside. In a large bowl,
cream butter with an electric mixer at medium speed. Add sugar, egg yolk,
and vanilla. Beat until light and fluffy. Gradually add the flour and salt
mixture and almonds, mixing until well blended.
2. Shape dough into two logs, each 1 1/2 inches in diameter, and wrap in
wax paper. Refrigerate until firm, at least two hours.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
Using a ruler, mark each log at 1/4 inch intervals. With a sharp thin knife,
cut into slices and put onto prepared cookie sheet, one inch apart.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from cookie sheet
and cool on a rack.
5. Prepare chocolate mixture. In the top of a double boiler, over hot water,
melt chocolate chips and butter. Stir in hot water.
6. Lay a sheet of wax paper on a table. Dip half of each cookie into the hot
chocolate mixture and put onto the wax paper.
7. If using sprinkles, dip a few cookies and then sprinkle while the chocolate
is still wet. Let dry for at least one hour.
